title: Pod (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Smuggling_Shipment_BotF.png|thumb|right|250px|A smuggling shipment pod]]

'''Pod''' is a common term. It is shared by:

*As the [[Wikipedia:acronym|acronym]] of the name of the book, ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''

*A [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] itself, or the part of the racer in which a pilot sat

*A [[Repulsorpod/Legends|repulsorpod]], or a Senate pod, the individual boxes in which Senatorial delegations sat

*An [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]

*A [[Pod (cloning)|Clone pod]]

*A [[Pod (social group)|social grouping]] of animals

*An [[All Terrain Attack Pod/Legends|All Terrain Attack Pod]]

*An [[All Terrain Rapid Deployment Pod]]

*An [[anti-matter pod]]

*[[Pod Trooper]]s

{{Disambig}}
{{Interlang
|ka=კაფსული (მრავალმნიშვნელოვანი)
}}
